category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Kazakhstan (EAEU / EAC) market.

title.en: China-to-Kazakhstan LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入哈萨克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入哈薩克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Kazakhstan's EAEU / Customs Union technical regulations with the EAC conformity mark (TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage safety, TR CU 020/2011 EMC, TR EAEU 037/2016 restriction of hazardous substances in EEE), EAEU energy efficiency, and GOST / IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 based standards versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与哈萨克斯坦 EAEU / 关税同盟技术法规（带 EAC 合格标志）的差距对照，涵盖 TR CU 004/2011 低压安全、TR CU 020/2011 电磁兼容、TR EAEU 037/2016 电子电气设备有害物质限制、EAEU 能效，及基于 GOST / IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的标准，并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與哈薩克 EAEU / 關稅同盟技術法規（帶 EAC 合格標誌）的差距對照，涵蓋 TR CU 004/2011 低壓安全、TR CU 020/2011 電磁兼容、TR EAEU 037/2016 電子電氣設備有害物質限制、EAEU 能效，及基於 GOST / IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的標準，並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EAEU / Customs Union technical regulations (TR CU / TR EAEU), GOST and ST RK standards, EAEU energy-efficiency thresholds, the TR EAEU 037/2016 restricted-substance list, and certification or declaration procedures with qualified professionals and an accredited Kazakhstan / EAEU conformity body before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及哈萨克斯坦 / EAEU 认可的合格评定机构核验现行 EAEU / 关税同盟技术法规（TR CU / TR EAEU）、GOST 及 ST RK 标准、EAEU 能效阈值、TR EAEU 037/2016 限制物质清单及认证或声明程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及哈薩克 / EAEU 認可的合格評定機構核驗現行 EAEU / 關稅同盟技術法規（TR CU / TR EAEU）、GOST 及 ST RK 標準、EAEU 能效閾值、TR EAEU 037/2016 限制物質清單及認證或聲明程序。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the Kazakhstan (EAEU) market must obtain the EAC conformity mark through certification or declaration under the Customs Union / EAEU technical regulations: TR CU 004/2011 (low-voltage electrical safety, on a GOST IEC 60598 / 62560 basis), TR CU 020/2011 (electromagnetic compatibility), and TR EAEU 037/2016 (restriction of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment — a RoHS-style regime that DOES apply, not an absence); comply with EAEU energy-efficiency requirements and labelling; document photobiological safety on a GOST IEC 62471 basis; appoint an in-country (Kazakhstan / EAEU) importer or authorised representative to hold the conformity documents; and have testing and certification performed by an EAEU-accredited body — none of which is satisfied by existing Chinese CCC certification or GB-standard reports. Kazakhstan's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China's nominal voltage and frequency, so no electrical re-rating is needed on that basis.
answer_first.zh: 进入哈萨克斯坦（EAEU）市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：依据关税同盟 / EAEU 技术法规通过认证或声明取得 EAC 合格标志——TR CU 004/2011（低压电气安全，基于 GOST IEC 60598 / 62560）、TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）及 TR EAEU 037/2016（电子电气设备有害物质限制——一种确实适用的 RoHS 式制度，并非缺失）；符合 EAEU 能效要求及标识；基于 GOST IEC 62471 记录光生物安全；指定境内（哈萨克斯坦 / EAEU）进口商或授权代表持有合格文件；并由 EAEU 认可机构进行检测和认证——上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证或 GB 标准报告所满足。哈萨克斯坦 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网与中国标称电压和频率一致，因此无需据此重新调整电气参数。
answer_first.zht: 進入哈薩克（EAEU）市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：依據關稅同盟 / EAEU 技術法規通過認證或聲明取得 EAC 合格標誌——TR CU 004/2011（低壓電氣安全，基於 GOST IEC 60598 / 62560）、TR CU 020/2011（電磁兼容）及 TR EAEU 037/2016（電子電氣設備有害物質限制——一種確實適用的 RoHS 式制度，並非缺失）；符合 EAEU 能效要求及標識；基於 GOST IEC 62471 記錄光生物安全；指定境內（哈薩克 / EAEU）進口商或授權代表持有合格文件；並由 EAEU 認可機構進行檢測和認證——上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證或 GB 標準報告所滿足。哈薩克 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網與中國標稱電壓和頻率一致，因此無需據此重新調整電氣參數。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Re-verify TR CU / TR EAEU technical-regulation references, EAEU energy-efficiency thresholds, the TR EAEU 037/2016 restricted-substance list, and accredited-body / EAC certification procedures on each review cycle against official EEC (Eurasian Economic Commission) and Kazakhstan regulator sources.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. EAEU energy-efficiency thresholds and the TR EAEU 037/2016 substance list must be re-checked against the current consolidated technical regulations on each review cycle.
